title: Clarify built artifacts vs runtime execution states in documentation
description: Separate documentation of build output (compiled artifacts) from runtime execution states (daemon vs local) to prevent confusion between these distinct concepts.

in: Separation of 'build artifacts' vs 'runtime execution states' concepts

verification.plan: Run mk2-alteration-gate and manually review the updated documentation to confirm clear separation between build artifacts (dist/ output) and runtime execution states (daemon vs local), ensuring no behavior or build changes were introduced.

evidence.notes: Documentation-only change to clarify distinction between build artifacts (dist/ output from npm run compile) and runtime execution states (daemon vs local fallback). This addresses confusion about 'built states' by separating these two distinct concepts in the documentation.

deferral.reason: Documentation clarity is immediate requirement for proper understanding

rollback.plan: Revert documentation changes via git revert
